name.description: Name of the organization surviving the merger. Distinct from CORP_MBCA-10's combined `merger.surviving_entity.name_and_jurisdiction` because LP_MLPA-10's SECOND has 3 separate widgets.

form.description: Legal form of the surviving entity (e.g., 'Limited Partnership', 'Limited Liability Company', 'Business Corporation').

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction of the governing statute for the surviving entity (e.g., 'Maine', 'Delaware').

surviving_entity_created_by_merger.description: Optional boolean (THIRD on LP_MLPA-10) — 'check only if applicable: the surviving organization was created as a result of the merger'. Largely redundant with `merger.fifth_election='created_by_merger'` (rubric should cross-check), but the form provides both as parallel declarations.

effective_date.description: Date the merger is effective under the governing statute of the surviving organization (FOURTH on LP_MLPA-10). Distinct from CORP_MBCA-10's `merger.future_effective_date` (which is optional 'if other than date of filing'); §1438 phrases this as a required effective date.

fifth_election.description: Mutually-exclusive enum for FIFTH paragraph on LP_MLPA-10: 'created_by_merger' (option 1, requires the new survivor's organizational document attached) or 'preexisted' (option 2, requires merger.fifth_subelection).

fifth_subelection.description: When merger.fifth_election='preexisted', a mutually-exclusive enum for sub-options under FIFTH option 2: 'amendments_attached' (Check Box23) or 'organizational_docs_unchanged' (Check Box24).

service_of_process_physical_address.description: Physical street address of an office that may be used for service of process on a foreign surviving organization (SEVENTH on LP_MLPA-10). Parallel to existing `merger.foreign_survivor.service_of_process_mailing_address` from CORP_MBCA-10 — LP_MLPA-10 splits into two address lines (physical + mailing).

additional_info_exhibit_letter.description: Letter of the exhibit containing additional information required by the governing statute of any constituent organization (EIGHTH on LP_MLPA-10).

additional_parties_attached.description: Boolean opt-in indicating additional constituent organizations are listed on a separate exhibit.

recital.description: FIRST: Constituent Organizations — row 1 (Name | Form of organization | Jurisdiction)

name_and_type.description: Must be completed by the First Constituent Organization to the Merger — (Name and form of participating constituent organization)

printed_name_and_capacity.description: First Constituent: (Type or print name and capacity) — signer 1
First Constituent: (Type or print name and capacity) — signer 2

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
